name: Janna

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Missile speed uses canonical ranged fallback (2000) because source champion payload omits basic-attack missile speed.

passive.name: Tailwind
passive.description_source: Innate: Nearby allied champions gain  bonus movement speed while moving toward  Janna.

effects.description: Innate: Janna grants 6% bonus movement speed to nearby allied champions that are facing in the direction of her location.
Janna's basic attacks on-hit and Zephyr deal bonus magic damage equal to 30% of her bonus movement speed.

passive.description: Innate: Janna grants 6% bonus movement speed to nearby allied champions that are facing in the direction of her location.

basic_ability_1.name: Howling Gale
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Janna summons a whirlwind at her current location that matures over a short time, increasing its range, speed, damage, and knock up duration.

effects.context_notes: Active: Janna summons a whirlwind at her current location that charges up over 3 seconds, increasing its range, speed, damage, and knock up duration every second over the duration.
Active: Janna summons a whirlwind at her current location that charges up over 3 seconds, increasing its range, speed, damage, and knock up duration every second over the duration.
Active: Janna summons a whirlwind at her current location that charges up over 3 seconds, increasing its range, speed, damage, and knock up duration every second over the duration.

effects.description: Howling Gale can be recast at any time within the duration, and does so automatically after the duration.
Recast: Janna launches the whirlwind in the direction she targeted over 1.25 seconds, dealing magic damage to enemies hit and knocking them up for 0.5 : 1.25 (based on seconds charged) seconds.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Janna summons a whirlwind at her current location that charges up over 3 seconds, increasing its range, speed, damage, and knock up duration every second over the duration. Howling Gale's direction is determined by this cast.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The initial cast and the manual recast count as ability activations for the purposes of on-cast effects such as Spellblade and triggering Force Pulse's passive.

basic_ability_2.name: Zephyr
basic_ability_2.description_source: Passive:  Janna gains  bonus movement speed and becomes permanently  ghosted.

effects.context_notes: Passive: Janna is ghosted and gains bonus movement speed.
Active: Janna sends an air elemental at the target enemy that deals magic damage and slows them for 2 seconds, capped at 99%.
Active: Janna sends an air elemental at the target enemy that deals magic damage and slows them for 2 seconds, capped at 99%.

basic_ability_2.description: Passive: Janna is ghosted and gains bonus movement speed.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The maximum slow (99%) is reached with 1316.

basic_ability_3.name: Eye of the Storm
basic_ability_3.description_source: Passive: Whenever  Janna's abilities  slow or  knock up at least one enemy  champion, she  refunds a portion of  Eye of the Storm's cooldown.

effects.description: Passive: Whenever Janna's abilities slow or knock up at least one enemy champion, 20% of Eye of the Storm's cooldown is refunded. This may occur once per spell cast.

effects.context_notes: Active: Janna grants the target allied champion or turret, or herself, a shield for 4 seconds.
While the shield holds, the target gains bonus attack damage.

basic_ability_3.description: Passive: Whenever Janna's abilities slow or knock up at least one enemy champion, 20% of Eye of the Storm's cooldown is refunded. This may occur once per spell cast.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Eye of the Storm has a forgiveness radius of 175 units.

ultimate.name: Monsoon

effects.description: Active: Janna unleashes a blast that knocks back all nearby enemies to up to 875 units over 0.5 seconds based on their proximity, though not through terrain.

effects.context_notes: Janna also channels for up to 3 seconds, healing herself and nearby allies every 0.25 seconds.
Janna also channels for up to 3 seconds, healing herself and nearby allies every 0.25 seconds.

ultimate.description: Active: Janna unleashes a blast that knocks back all nearby enemies to up to 875 units over 0.5 seconds based on their proximity, though not through terrain.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The following table refers for interactions while Janna is channeling: Type Channel Attacking Interrupts Abilities Interrupts Movement Interrupts Items Usable Shurelya's Battlesong Youmuu's Ghostblade Randuin's Omen Disabled Hextech Rocketbelt Interrupted by A
ultimate.description_source: Active: Janna unleashes a blast that knocks back all nearby enemies to up to 875 units over 0.5 seconds based on their proximity, though not through terrain.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata
manual verification of ability timing and execution semantics for context-note normalization

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
